archetype_reasoning: Virtually every resolved and open trade is a NO position entered at 0.99+ (or YES at 0.98+), collecting tiny premiums on near-certain outcomes. Directionality of 1.0 confirms a single-direction strategy with no genuine two-sided forecasting. Despite 169 resolved trades, domain accuracy sits near 50/50 across both domains, consistent with a harvesting strategy where wins and losses on near-certainty bets roughly cancel until a tail event hits.
domain_blindspots: Trump_US: near-certainty harvesting masks zero genuine forecasting edge; coin-flip accuracy confirms no real predictive signal
Other: same pattern, 51.9% accuracy on near-certainty entries is not meaningful signal
domain_summary: This trader has no identifiable forecasting edge in any domain. All activity is yield harvesting at extreme probabilities; the high ELO reflects volume of correct near-certainty resolutions, not analytical skill.
signal_weight_reasoning: All entries are at 0.99+ prices, meaning this trader is never expressing a genuine probability judgment — they are collecting yield on outcomes the market already rates as near-certain. Domain accuracy of ~50% across both domains confirms the losses (tail events) offset the wins. No signal value for STR-003 forecasting purposes.
behavioural_flags: Exclusively enters NO positions at 0.99+ or YES positions at 0.98+ — zero contested-price entries
Directionality of 1.0: never buys the opposing side in any market
Repeats the same market multiple times (e.g. 7 entries on Trump family VP nomination) at identical near-certainty prices — scaling into yield positions
Realized PnL is negative (-$204) despite 169 trades, confirming tail-event losses outpace premium collection
Resolution dates all cluster on 2026-04-01, suggesting these are old markets being batch-resolved rather than active recent trading
risk_patterns: Negative realized PnL despite high-win-rate strategy — tail events periodically wipe accumulated premium
Concentration in a single strategy type with no diversification of approach
Multiple repeat entries in same market suggests position scaling without reconsidering thesis
High ELO score is misleading — inflated by volume of trivial correct resolutions, not forecasting quality

notable_calls.market: Will a Trump family member win 2024 Republican VP nomination?
notable_calls.significance: Lost 4 of 7 entries at 0.99 on same market — illustrates tail-event risk of harvesting strategy; even 'safe' markets bite repeatedly

notable_calls.significance: Repeat losses at near-certainty prices confirm yield harvesting is not reliably profitable here

notable_calls.significance: Lost one entry, won another in the same market at slightly higher price — characteristic harvesting split outcome

open_positions_summary: All open positions are NO bets on already-resolved or near-resolved political scenarios (RFK Democratic nominee, another woman as Democratic nominee, balance-of-power outcomes, Biden resignation) at prices of 0.95–0.997. These imply no forward-looking thesis — they are legacy yield positions awaiting resolution, likely long-stale.
watch_items: Monitor whether any open near-certainty positions resolve against the trader — another cluster loss would confirm ongoing strategy fragility
Watch for any deviation from 0.99+ entry prices — any entry below 0.90 would be significant behavioral change worth noting
Track whether realized PnL continues to deteriorate, which would signal the harvesting strategy is net-negative over time
summary: This trader is a textbook yield harvester with a directionality of 1.0 and virtually all entries at 0.99+ prices — there is no genuine forecasting activity to extract signal from. Despite a LEGENDARY-tier ELO (2695), the score reflects trade volume on trivial resolutions, not analytical accuracy; domain accuracy of ~50% in both active domains confirms this. The negative realized PnL (-$204) across 169 trades demonstrates the strategy is marginally net-negative when tail events hit. Exclude entirely from signal generation.
